languages.text: {n}После нескольких попыток меровцы выработали стратегию мобильных отвлекающих отрядов. Они научились исчезать из точки, где псайкер оставил варп-эхо, задолго до появления Погонщицы. Получившие прозвище "беглецы", эти отряды стали пристанищем для сорвиголов Заркова.{/n}

{n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}После нескольких попыток меровцы выработали стратегию мобильных отвлекающих отрядов. Они научились исчезать из точки, где псайкер оставил варп-эхо, задолго до появления Погонщицы. Получившие прозвище "беглецы", эти отряды стали пристанищем для сорвиголов Заркова.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

{n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

{n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数々の試行錯誤を経て、メロヴィアンは機動的な誘導部隊の戦略を確立した。彼らは、ドローバーが到着するずっと前に、サイカーがワープ・エコーを消した地点から姿を消す方法を学んだ。この部隊は「ランナー」と呼ばれ、ザルコフの無謀な魂たちの避難所となった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}数々の試行錯誤を経て、メロヴィアンは機動的な誘導部隊の戦略を確立した。彼らは、ドローバーが到着するずっと前に、サイカーがワープ・エコーを消した地点から姿を消す方法を学んだ。この部隊は「ランナー」と呼ばれ、ザルコフの無謀な魂たちの避難所となった。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tras varios intentos, los merovianos desarrollaron una estrategia de unidades móviles de distracción. Aprendieron a esfumarse del lugar donde el psíquico dejaba el eco de disformidad antes de que llegaran los Pastores. Conocidos como «corredores», estos grupos se convirtieron en protectores de la gente de Zarkov.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras varios intentos, los merovianos desarrollaron una estrategia de unidades móviles de distracción. Aprendieron a esfumarse del lugar donde el psíquico dejaba el eco de disformidad antes de que llegaran los Pastores. Conocidos como «corredores», estos grupos se convirtieron en protectores de la gente de Zarkov.{/n}

languages.text: {n}经过多次尝试，梅罗夫人开发出一套机动诱饵战术。他们学会了在拒生花现身之前，早早从灵能者留下亚空间回响的地点撤离。这些被称为“奔行者”的部队，成为了扎尔科夫亡命徒们的归宿。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}经过多次尝试，梅罗夫人开发出一套机动诱饵战术。他们学会了在拒生花现身之前，早早从灵能者留下亚空间回响的地点撤离。这些被称为“奔行者”的部队，成为了扎尔科夫亡命徒们的归宿。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nach mehreren Versuchen entwickelten die Merovianer eine Strategie für mobile Ablenkungseinheiten. Sie lernten, die Stelle, an der der Psioniker das Warpecho hinterließ, lange vor der Ankunft der Treiber zu verlassen. Diese als 'Läufer' bekannten Einheiten wurden zur Anlaufstelle für Zarkovs tollkühne Seelen."{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach mehreren Versuchen entwickelten die Merovianer eine Strategie für mobile Ablenkungseinheiten. Sie lernten, die Stelle, an der der Psioniker das Warpecho hinterließ, lange vor der Ankunft der Treiber zu verlassen. Diese als 'Läufer' bekannten Einheiten wurden zur Anlaufstelle für Zarkovs tollkühne Seelen."

languages.text: {n}Birkaç denemeden sonra Merovlular, mobil oyalama birimleri stratejisi geliştirdi. Herhangi bir Çoban ortaya çıkmadan çok önce, ruhsezerin öteboyut yankısı bıraktığı noktadan kaybolmayı öğrendiler. "Koşucular" olarak bilinen bu birimler, Zarkov'un gözü pek ruhları için bir sığınak hâline geldi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. They learned how to vanish from the point where the psyker left the warp echo long before any Drovers appeared. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}

"Koşucular" olarak bilinen bu birimler, Zarkov'un gözü pek ruhları için bir sığınak hâline geldi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Après plusieurs tentatives, les Meroviens élaborèrent une stratégie reposant sur des unités de diversion mobiles. Leurs membres apprirent à se volatiliser dès l'instant où leur psyker avait généré un écho du Warp, bien avant l'apparition des Chasseurs. Surnommées « les coureurs », ces unités réunissaient les âmes les plus téméraires de Zarkov.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After several attempts, the Merovians developed a strategy of mobile diversionary units. Known as "the runners," these units became havens for the foolhardy souls of Zarkov.{/n}
